firstFeature.title: You haven't read anything yet.

latest.fallbackDek: A small scene from everyday life.

newStory.title: Another story

dek.unknown: The words you save come back just before you'd forget them.
dek.none: Nothing for now. Come back after reading something.

chat.title: Talk with Klara
chat.dek: Free conversation, whatever's on your mind.

newstory.title: What shall we talk about today?
newstory.sub: One word is enough. Or let Klara choose.

input.placeholder: A bakery on a Saturday at 8…

dek.practiced_one: Nice. You practiced your pronunciation on {{count}} sentence.
dek.practiced_other: Nice. You practiced your pronunciation on {{count}} sentences.
dek.read: Nice. Klara read the story for you.

error.mic_denied: We need permission to use your microphone.
error.mic_unavailable: Your browser doesn't support audio recording.
error.no_speech: We didn't catch any speech. Speak louder and record again.
error.audio_too_large: The recording is too long. Try a shorter sentence.
error.audio_undecodable: We couldn't process the audio. Try again.
error.service_unavailable: Pronunciation scoring isn't available right now.
error.network: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and retry.

languages.title: What language do you speak, and which one do you want to learn?

context.label: Your context (optional)

password.title: Want to add a password as backup?
password.hint: You signed in with Google. If you'd like, add a password so you can also log in with email.
password.label: Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.title: Your profile with Klara
settings.sub: Klara adapts the stories to this information.

field.name: Name
field.contextPlaceholder: e.g. I use it for work, I travel often, I'm into cooking…

settings.sameLangWarn: Pick a language different from your native one.

error.sameLang: Your native language and the language you're learning must be different.

invitations.help: Create a link and send it to a friend. Each link works once.
invitations.emailLabel: Email (optional — locks the link to that person)
invitations.empty: You haven't created any invitations yet.

security.title: Set a password
security.hint: You signed in with Google only. Add a password if you'd like to also log in with email.

error.googleFailed: Couldn't sign in with Google. Please try again.

signup.title: Create account

inviteOnly.title: Invitation-only signup
inviteOnly.body: Access to Klara is invitation-only. Ask the admin for a link and open it here.

error.allowlist: This email is not authorized to sign up.
error.inviteInvalid: This invitation link is not valid.
error.inviteUsed: This invitation link has already been used.
error.inviteRevoked: This invitation link has been revoked.

signup.verifyEmailSent: We sent you an email to confirm your address.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.error: We couldn't verify your email. The link may have expired.

reset.forgotSent: If the account exists, we've sent a reset link to your inbox.
reset.success: Done. You can sign in with your new password.

review.title: Coming soon.
review.dek: Klara reviews with you the words from stories you've already read. No counters. No pressure.
